summary: Iteration 42: Comprehensive testing of Landing Page ('Coming Soon') feature integration. All 19 backend API tests passed. All 18 frontend features verified via Playwright. The landing page is fully functional with countdown, CTA buttons, Notify Me modal, contact form, cookie banner, and admin management.
critical_code_review_comments: LandingPage.js: Well-structured component with countdown hook, cookie banner, notify modal, and contact form - all with proper data-testid attributes
AdminLayout.js: Sidebar correctly includes 'LANDING PAGE' section with Content, Subscribers, Contacts links (lines 25-28)
SettingsManager.js: General tab has Landing Page section with Yes/No radio, launch date, logo upload, background image upload (lines 204-237)
SettingsManager.js: Colors tab includes Landing Page color group with all --lp-* CSS variables (lines 270-277)
themeColors.js: LANDING_PAGE_COLORS array properly defines 25 CSS variables for landing page styling (lines 51-77)
api.js: landingAPI and adminAPI methods properly implemented for landing page endpoints (lines 56-60, 206-212)
App.js: useLandingActive hook correctly checks landing_page_enabled and launch_date to control routing (lines 275-289)
App.js: Routing logic properly shows landing page for all non-admin, non-my-account routes when active (lines 324-361)
landing.py: Backend routes properly implement CRUD for landing content, subscribers, and contacts with admin auth
seed_data_creation: Test subscribers and contacts created during testing (prefixed with test_, playwright_test_, contact_test_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing Page feature is fully implemented and tested. Key verified features: (1) Landing page renders at / with countdown, CTA buttons, description, contact form, footer, cookie banner. (2) Notify Me modal opens and saves to landing_subscribers collection. (3) Contact form saves to landing_contacts collection. (4) Cookie banner Accept/Decline works with localStorage persistence. (5) Admin login at /admin/login works. (6) Admin panel has 'LANDING PAGE' sidebar section with Content, Subscribers, Contacts. (7) Landing Content Manager has all editable fields. (8) Subscribers/Contacts managers show tables with delete option. (9) Settings > General has LP enable/disable, launch date, logo, bg image. (10) Settings > Colors has LP color block with all CSS variables. (11) /my-account route always accessible regardless of LP status. (12) Countdown auto-updates every second. Landing page is currently ENABLED with launch date 2026-04-20T09:00.

landing_page_renders.details: Landing page shows at / with countdown (10d 17h 33m), CTA buttons, description, contact form, footer

notify_me_modal.details: Notify Me button opens modal with first_name, last_name, email fields. Submission saves to landing_subscribers

contact_form.details: Contact form saves to landing_contacts via POST /api/public/landing-contact

cookie_banner.details: Cookie banner appears, Accept/Decline hides it and persists in localStorage as 'lp_cookie_consent'

admin_login.details: Admin login at /admin/login works with admin@consultant.com / Admin123!

admin_sidebar_landing_section.details: Admin panel has 'LANDING PAGE' section with Content, Subscribers, Contacts links

landing_content_manager.details: Shows editable fields for hero, buttons, description, contact form, notify modal, footer, cookie banner

landing_subscribers_manager.details: Shows table of subscribers with delete option (4 subscribers visible)

landing_contacts_manager.details: Shows table of contacts with delete option (3 messages visible)

settings_general_landing_page.details: Settings > General has Yes/No radio, launch date (04/20/2026 09:00), logo upload, bg image upload

settings_colors_landing_page.details: Settings > Colors has Landing Page color block with all --lp-* CSS variables

my_account_accessible.details: /my-account route shows member login, not landing page

countdown_auto_update.details: Countdown updates every second (verified: 37 -> 34 seconds in 3 seconds)

api_landing_subscribe.details: POST /api/public/landing-subscribe returns success, prevents duplicate emails

api_admin_landing_content.details: GET/PUT /api/admin/landing-content works for reading and updating content
